title: SuperHero - Super powers mod
description: abilities. powers. suits. this has everything.
body:
ability's. powers. suit's. this has everything.

# wiki
## powers
- super-speed
- kryptonian powers
- cold-fusion
- panther wrath
## suits
- the flash suit
all pieces
- black panther suit
all pieces
- cryo suit
chest and below
- super-man suit
chest and below
## serums
- velocity X - grants the player super-speed
- cold fusion - grants the player cold-fusion
- kryptonian serum - grants the players kryptonian powers
- panther serum - grants the player panther wrath
## abilities
- flash-time - makes every thing slow down - super-speed
- sun-healing - heals the player with the power of the sun - kryptonian powers
- kinetic explosion - creates an explosion with kinetic energy - panther wrath
### extra
- tachyon enhancer - enhances the super-speed power
- enlarging/shrinking pym particles - enlarges or shrinks the player
- negative pym particles - returns the player to his natural size
- uru - can be found in the moon dimension
- vibranium - can be found in the moon dimension
- the moon dimension - can be reached when the player is above Y 300
- Mjolnir
- super suit crafter - can be used to make suits
- nano injector - can be used to make a suit nano-tech
- gene modifier - can be used to give the player permanent powers
- nano staff - when used as a weapon sends the target flying really far
# recipes
